column1: # effort_bands.tsv - maps (program_type x complexity class) to a WIDE published effort band (person-days),
# plus named drivers and DECLARED uplift factors. Override at {custom_url}\effort_bands.tsv.
# kind=SPEC rows: keyed (program_type, class); kind=LEDGER rows: keyed (tier, object_type) for --ledger mode.
# uplift_* are multipliers ON TOP of the build band (total = build * (1 + uplift_test + uplift_integration +
# uplift_functional)); they are DECLARED guesses until calibration and always shown in the assumptions register.
